languages.text: {n}Ваша воля, закаленная в многочисленных испытаниях на стезе Вольного Торговца, остается абсолютно бессильной перед ксеносскими чарами, сковавшими тело.{/n}
{n}Your will, forged in the countless trials of the Rogue Trader's path, remains utterly powerless against the xenos enchantments shackling your body.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваша воля, закаленная в многочисленных испытаниях на стезе Вольного Торговца, остается абсолютно бессильной перед ксеносскими чарами, сковавшими тело.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Your will, forged in the countless trials of the Rogue Trader's path, remains utterly powerless against the xenos enchantments shackling your body.{/n}
{n}Your will, forged in the countless trials of the Rogue Trader's path, remains utterly powerless against the xenos enchantments shackling your body.{/n}
{n}Your will, forged in the countless trials of the Rogue Trader's path, remains utterly powerless against the xenos enchantments shackling your body.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ローグ・トレーダーの道で数えきれないほどの試練を乗り越えて鍛えられたあなたの意志は、あなたの体を縛る異星人の呪文には全く効きません。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your will, forged in the countless trials of the Rogue Trader's path, remains utterly powerless against the xenos enchantments shackling your body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ローグトレーダーの道で数えきれないほどの試練を乗り越えて鍛えられたあなたの意志は、あなたの体を縛る異星人の呪文には全く効きません。{/n}

languages.text: {n}面对这禁锢你身体的异形法术，你在行商浪人之路上千锤百炼而成的意志根本毫无招架之力。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your will, forged in the countless trials of the Rogue Trader's path, remains utterly powerless against the xenos enchantments shackling your body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}面对这禁锢你身体的异形法术，你在行商浪人之路上千锤百炼而成的意志根本毫无招架之力。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tu voluntad, templada en la infinidad de pruebas de tu camino como Comerciante Independiente, es absolutamente impotente frente a los encantamientos xenos que atenazan tu cuerpo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your will, forged in the countless trials of the Rogue Trader's path, remains utterly powerless against the xenos enchantments shackling your body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu voluntad, templada en la infinidad de pruebas de tu camino como Comerciante Independiente, es absolutamente impotente frente a los encantamientos xenos que atenazan tu cuerpo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dein von zahllosen Prüfungen gestählter Wille ist gegen die Zauber des Xenos absolut machtlos, die deinen Körper in Ketten legen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your will, forged in the countless trials of the Rogue Trader's path, remains utterly powerless against the xenos enchantments shackling your body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dein von zahllosen Prüfungen gestählter Wille ist gegen die Zauber des Xenos absolut machtlos, die deinen Körper in Ketten legen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Votre volonté, forgée par les innombrables épreuves pavant la voie d'{mf|un libre-marchand|une libre-marchande}, demeure totalement impuissante face aux enchantements xénos qui entravent votre corps.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Hür Tacirlik yolunun sayısız sınavında dövülmüş iraden, bedenini zincirleyen zeno büyüleri karşısında tamamen güçsüz kalıyor.{/n}
